news.title: Annual Science Fair Winners Announced!
news.excerpt: Congratulations to all the participants and winners of this year's Science Fair. The ingenuity on display was truly inspiring.

news.title: New Sports Complex Opening Next Month
news.excerpt: Our brand new sports complex is almost ready. We can't wait to see our student athletes make the most of these world-class facilities.

news.title: Guest Speaker Series: Tech Leaders
news.excerpt: Join us this Friday for an inspiring talk by top tech leaders who will share their journey and insights with our students.
